phrases.intent_en: Can I buy olive oil along the path?
phrases.cultural_note: Olive oil is sold at specific points along the Olive Path; staff can guide to nearest seller.

phrases.intent_en: Are the Gandria wine cellars open today?
phrases.text_local: Haben die Cantine di Gandria heute geöffnet?
phrases.cultural_note: Wine cellars follow regional opening hours; confirm with staff or signage at the premises.

phrases.intent_en: Where does the Olive Path start?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to the trailhead as the starting point near the village limits, often linked to the parking area.

likely_response.translation_en: At the village entrance, by the parking lot.

responses.english: At the village entrance, by the parking lot.

phrases.intent_en: Must I stay on marked stones?
phrases.text_local: Muss ich auf den markierten Steinen bleiben?
phrases.cultural_note: Staying on marked stones is a local conservation rule; deviations risk damaging the path.

likely_response.local: Ja, zur Sicherheit und zum Schutz.

responses.french: Ja, zur Sicherheit und zum Schutz.

phrases.intent_en: How do I pay for pre-trail parking?
phrases.text_local: Wie zahle ich Parkgebühren vor der Wanderung?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking payment is automated; cards and coins are standard but staff can assist if needed.

likely_response.translation_en: At the machine, card or coins accepted.

responses.english: At the machine, card or coins accepted.
